MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robin Gilmore is present. Represented by Jim McInerny.
Attorney Joseph Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brad Edwards is present.
Attorney Steven Schectman representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. Per stipulation of the parties and with the approval of JPT Rosenquist the trial is continued to apr-30-2012.
